channel.title: HB 2249 - Amending the state civil service statutes to include Washington technology solutions network and security systems employees.

item.title: First reading, referred to State Government & Tribal Relations.
item.description: First reading, referred to State Government & Tribal Relations.
item.guid: 2026-01-12/First reading, referred to State Government & Tribal Relations.

item.title: 👍Tim Tharp - Washington Federation of State Employees
item.description: Tim Tharp signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Federation of State Employees.

item.title: SGOV - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: SGOV - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.description: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.guid: 2026-02-06/Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 85; nays, 10; absent, 0; excused, 3.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 85; nays, 10; absent, 0; excused, 3.
item.guid: 2026-02-10/Third reading, passed; yeas, 85; nays, 10; absent, 0; excused, 3.

item.title: First reading, referred to State Government, Tribal Affairs & Elections.
item.description: First reading, referred to State Government, Tribal Affairs & Elections.
item.guid: 2026-02-12/First reading, referred to State Government, Tribal Affairs & Elections.

item.title: 👍Ashley Fueston - Washington Federation of State Employees- Vice President
item.description: Ashley Fueston signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Federation of State Employees- Vice President.

item.title: ❓Joshua Johnston - WaTech
item.description: Joshua Johnston signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent WaTech.

item.title: 👍Kati Durkin - Washington Federation of State Employees
item.description: Kati Durkin signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Federation of State Employees.
